reasoning: The question asks if the average daily temperature in Martinique (Aimé Césaire International Airport) on 2026-02-07 will be higher than on 2025-11-09. Martinique has a tropical climate where November is generally significantly warmer than February. Average daily mean temperatures in November are around 27.6 °C, whereas February is typically the coolest month of the year with averages around 26.3 °C. Early November (Nov 9) is historically closer to 27.8 °C, while early February (Feb 7) is about 26.4 °C. While a rainy, unusually cool day in November combined with a sunny, warm day in February could result in the February date being warmer, the expected difference of roughly -1.4 °C and the standard deviation of daily temperature distributions around 1.2-1.4°C yield roughly a z-score of -1.0. This translates to about an 18% probability of the February date being strictly warmer.
